title: Rainbows & Radium
description: Powerful new ores can be used to make customizable bombs, 128-slot barrels, a modular chest-locking system, Ender Pearls enchanted with Infinity, Paxels, multi-use Totems, and more!
body:
## Important Stuff

<details>
<summary>-Overview-</summary>

_To give you a rough idea of what is included without making you read about every single feature._

* **Deepsteel Bombs** can be crafted and customized to ignore armor, damage terrain, prevent healing, and more!
* 84-slot **Uranium Barrels** can hold many more items than a chest in just one block of space 
* **Polychromite Pearls** are enchanted with Infinity, so you will only need one
* many functional foods like **Fairy Bread**, **Polychromite Apples**, and more
* new combat & utility-oriented **Status Effects** (offense and defense)
* **Polychromium Totems** function as multi-use Totems
* another EPIC new **Music Disc** by [**@TenM**](https://youtube.com/@Tenm)
</details>
<details>
<summary>-Images-</summary>

_For the descriptions of the pictures, go to the "Gallery" tab._

  ![Items in the mod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d6a9c34014eebd7f44781371b66b1f95d67d53ee.png)  
  
  ![Some blocks in the mod (Left to right: Polychromite-Infused Sand, Polychromite Ore, Radium Ore, Deepslate Radium Ore, Deepsteel Ore, Block of Radium Sludge, Block of Uranium, Deepsteel Block)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7caebd7c5f09d3398ed7e14ef0eecd4ec244ad33.png)
  
_Shhh... we don't talk about this_
  ![COMPLETELY UNIQUE BLOCKs that are 100% NOT RECOLORS (Radio Campfire, Radio Fire, Block of Uranium, Radio Lantern, Lockable Chest, Uranium Barrel)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b122dd8fcb32b0a4ee1bb1d35a21b77edd08416b.png)
  
  ![Even more blocks (Super TNT, Lockable Chest, Locked Chest, Smooth Stone Pedestal, Quartz Pedestal, Gold Pedestal, Emerald Pedestal)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/96278b9c6011f4f678a8cbd7fe7b844ba3eb5cdb_0.webp)
  
  ![Artificing Table and Artificing Table GUI](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0bba1cf0321fc7cbdf651712717fff0a3d3f3936_0.webp)

</details>
<details>
<summary>-Getting Started-</summary>

_A quick explanation of how to locate the content in a Survival playthrough_

Polychromite-Infused Sand and Polychromite Ore will spawn in the desert, Deepsteel Ore will spawn in the Nether, and Radium Ore and Deepslate Radium Ore will spawn in caves and underground. (Check the "Items/Ingredients tab to see how to use the raw materials).

To use most Polychromium items, you will need to find a Quarry, a new structure that spawns in the Desert. They have about the same frequency as Desert Temples, so they shouldn't be too hard to find. In this structure, you can loot chests and brush Suspicious Sand to find a Polychromium Upgrade Smithing Template (along with many other items), which you will need to use in a Smithing Table to upgrade gear.

</details>
<details>
<summary>-My Other Projects-</summary>

_These mods may not all be updated to the latest version. All of these mods are owned and maintained by me._

[**Rainbows & Radium**](https://modrinth.com/mod/rainbows-and-radium) - Powerful new ores can be used to make customizable bombs, 128-slot barrels, a modular chest-locking system, Ender Pearls enchanted with infinity, Paxels, multi-use Totems, and more!

[**Savage Cyclopes**](https://modrinth.com/mod/savage-cyclopes-mod) - New Cyclops entities can be found across all 3 dimensions. Some are hostile, attacking you with poisonous darts or magic, while others are neutral or passive, bartering with or assisting you in your various adventures.  Enticing rewards are granted to those who can defeat them.

[**Beastly Buggers**](https://modrinth.com/mod/beastly-buggers) -  Unique and useful items can be obtained by facing new and difficult insects and arachnids, each with a unique spawn location to incentivize exploration. Increasing the challenge of Minecraft in fun and vanilla-friendly ways is the purpose of this mod.

[**Funky yet Functional**](https://modrinth.com/mod/funky-foodstuffs) - Adds a few silly new items, all of which have their own functionality, including spicy peppers that make you breathe fire, beans that let you fly via flatulence, and so much more!
</details>

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/c0mvGwGCxEU" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

## Content & Features

<details>
<summary>Items</summary>
<details>
<summary>Ingredients</summary>
  
**Chromite Nuggets** (found in six colors: red, orange, yellow, green, blue, and purple) can be obtained by mining Chromite Ore (a sandstone variant found in the desert), with a chance to get 1-3 colors and 1-4 nuggets of each color. They can be combined in a Crafting Table (no specific pattern required) to make **Raw Polychromite**. This can be smelted into a **Dull Polychromite Ingot**, which can be combined with a Glow Inc Sac in a Crafting Table to create a **Polychromite Ingot**. Polychromite-Infused Sand has a chance to replace sand in the Desert, and will drop 1-4 **Polychromite Dust**. Putting four Polychromite Dust in the crafting table creates a Polychromite Ingot.  4 Polychromite Ingots can be combined with 4 Netherite Ingots to create **Polychromium Alloy.**

**Radium Sludge** is dropped from Uranium Ore (and it's Deepslate variant), and 4 can be crafted together to make a **Uranium Ingot**.

**Deepsteel Plates** have a chance to be found when brushing Suspicious Sand in a Quarry (A new structure that spawns in the desert).

**Disc Fragments** can be found by brushing the suspicious sand in Quarries. When 9 are combined in a 3x3 crafting grid, the new **Music Disc "Below"** by [@T_en_M](https://www.youtube.com/@Tenm) is created. 

</details>
<details>
<summary>Tools</summary>

**Deepsteel Paxels** can be crafted like a pickaxe and axe combined, using 2 sticks and 4 Deepsteel Plates.  They have the efficiency of iron tools and are effective on all blocks that can be broken with a shovel, axe, or pickaxe.  They can also be used to strip logs and turn dirt blocks into paths.  When upgraded with a Polychromium Upgrade Smithing Template and Polychromium Alloy in a Smithing Table, it becomes a **Polychromium Paxel**, which is similar but has the durability and mining speed of a netherite tool.  Paxels can be enchanted with all enchantments that can be applied to axes, pickaxes, and shovels.

**Polychromium Totems** are made by upgrading an empty bundle with a Polychromium Upgrade and Polychromium Alloy. They are similar to a Totem of Undying, but have two charges each.

**Polychromite Pearls** can be crafted by surrounding an Ender Pearl with 8 Polychromite Dust.  They have the "Infinity" enchantment, so you can basically use them infinitely.  For balancing reasons, it has a 1 in 50 chance to break and turn into a regular Ender Pearl when used.

**Polychromium Pouches** are made by upgrading an empty bundle with a Polychromium Upgrade and Polychromium Alloy. They are small storage containers that have nine slots, like smaller shulker boxes, but can be opened by right-clicking, so they don't have the need to be placed and broken to access their contents.

**Polychromite Experience Flasks** can be crafted with 4 Bottles o' Enchanting and 5 Polychromite Ingots.  When used, they throw 4 Bottles o' Enchanting at once.

Using 3 Deepsteel Plates in a row with two nether Quartz below and to the left of them, **Deepsteel Keys** can be crafted. They have no function until you add "bits" via an Artificing Table.  There are 3 slots for bits, and they can accept any kind of Chromite Nugget, Iron Nuggets, Gold Nuggets, and Ghast Tears. That means that there are 729 possible combinations of bits. Keys can be used to lock, unlock and access Locked/Lockable Chests (See "Blocks/Storage")

**Master Keys** are only accessible via the Creative Inventory. If you forget the combination of bits on your key and/or lose it, and you want to access your Locked Chest, you have the option to give yourself one and open it.


</details>
<details>
<summary>Weapons</summary>

**Deepsteel Spears** can be crafted by placing two sticks and a Deepsteel Plate diagonally across a 3x3 crafting grid. They deal 6 attack damage, have 0.9 attack speed, and have an extra two blocks of reach. Using a Polychromium Upgrade Smithing Template and Polychromium Alloy in a Smithing Table, you can create a **Polychromium Spear**, which deals 8 attack damage and has 1 attack speed. They can be enchanted with Unbreaking, Mending, Frost Aspect, and Weighted Shaft (See "Enchantments"). 

With a Deepsteel Plate and a String, you can create a **Deepsteel Bomb**. By default, they don't do anything when thrown, but you can add "charges" to them via an artificing table. There are 4 kinds of charges: **Explosive** (made with Gunpowder), **Sonic** (made with Echo Shards), **Radioactive** (made with Radium Sludge), and **Magical** (made with Dragon's Breath). Explosive Charges create normal explosions, Sonic Charges create sonic explosions that do not damage blocks and ignore armor, Radioactive Charges make an AoE cloud that prevents entities from healing, and Magical Charges damage entities in a radius, similar to how Dragon Fireballs work. The sizes of explosions/AoE clouds depends on how many charges of a certain type there are.
</details>
<details>
<summary>Foods</summary>
  
**Polychromite Apples** are crafted by surrounding an apple with 8 Polychromite Dust. They apply Regeneration II for 5 seconds and Absorption II for 2 minutes.

**Polychromium Apples** are made by upgrading a Golden Apples with a Polychromium Upgrade and Polychromium Alloy. When consumed, they grant Regeneration III for 5 seconds, Resistance for 1 minute, and Absorption III for 2 minutes.

If you use an Enchanted Golden Apple instead of a Golden Apple in the previous recipe, you will make an **Enchanted Polychromium Apple**. These apply Regeneration III for 20 seconds, Absorption V for 2 minutes, Resistance II for 2 minutes, and Fire Resistance for 5 minutes.

**Fairy Bread** is a common item to find in the Quarry (a new structure that spawns in the desert).  Alternatively, you can craft it with a Bread and Polychromite Dust. When consumed, it heals 10 health (5 hearts) and has a 25% chance to apply the new Grace effect.

Using a Cooked Cod, Sweet Berries, a Golden Carrot, Polychromite Dust, and a Bowl, you can craft a **Polychromite Platter**. This instantly fills up your hunger and saturation bar, as well as granting the advancement "An Expensive Palette".

9 **Chicken Nuggets** can be crafted from a Cooked Chicken and a Bread. They are consumed in half a second and replenish 4 hunger (2 drumstick icons) and 0.2 saturation.

</details>
</details>
<details>
<summary>Blocks</summary>
<details>
<summary>Ores</summary>

**Uranium Ore** and **Deepslate Uranium Ore** generate in veins of 2-3 blocks in all underground Overworld biomes. When mined with an iron pickaxe or better, they drop 1-4 Radium Sludge. If the pickaxe is enchanted with Condensing (See "Enchantments"), they instead drop 1 Uranium Ingot.  If the pickaxe is enchanted with Silk Touch, they drop themselves.

**Deepsteel Ore** has a 25% chance to spawn each chunk.  When they do, they generate in veins of 12-16. When mined with a Stone Pickaxe or better, they drop 1-3 Deepsteel Plates, unless the pickaxe has Silk Touch, in which case it drops itself.

**Polychromite Ore** and **Polychromite-Infused Sand** generate in veins of 1-6 blocks on the surface of the desert (i.e. first 15 layers). If the replaced block is Sand, then Polychromite-Infused Sand generates.  If the replaced block is Sandstone, Polychromite Ore generates instead. When Polychromite Ore is mined with a Stone Pickaxe or better, it drops 1-6 colors of 1-2 Chromite Nuggets. If the pickaxe is enchanted with Condensing (See: "Enchantments"), it instead drops 1-2 Raw Polychromite.  When Polychromite-Infused Sand is mined, it drops 1-4 Polychromite Dust, unless the pickaxe is enchanted with Condensing (See: "Enchantments"), in which case it drops 1 Polychromite Ingot.

</details>
<details>
<summary>Storage</summary>

**Uranium Barrels** are crafted with 8 Uranium ingots surrounding a Barrel. They have 84 slots (7 rows of 12). _This is a severe lag hazard - do NOT break a full Uranium Barrel, and do NOT let creepers near ANY Uranium Barrels!_

**Lockable Chests** can be crafted with a chest surrounded by 7 Deepsteel Plates and a Polychromium Alloy. They have 2 states, Locked and Unlocked. By default, they are unlocked, but when you use a Deepsteel Key on one (it must have 3 bits) while sneaking it locks the chest. Locked Chests can ONLY be opened by a player with a key in their hand that has THE SAME COMBINATION OF BITS in the SAME ORDER that the key used to lock it did. When mined, if the chest is locked, all items stay in the chest-item as if it was a Shulker Box, so breaking a Locked Chest will NOT be a viable way to steal items from it. If the chest is NOT locked, it drops itself and all items in in normally. The only way to unlock a chest is to use a Deepsteel Key that has THE SAME COMBINATION OF BITS in the SAME ORDER that the key used to lock it did (or, if you have access to commands or creative mode, a Master Key) on it while sneaking.

**Stone Pedestals** are crafted by making an "I" in the crafting table out of Smooth Stone, but replacing the top-center block with an Item frame. You can convert any pedestal to another kind of pedestal by putting it in the center of a crafting table and filling all adjacent slots with the correct material: Nether Quartz for a **Quartz Pedestal**, Gold Ingots for a **Golden Pedestal**, and Emeralds for an **Emerald Pedestal**.  You can revert a pedestal to its stone form by using Smooth Stone.
</details>
<details>
<summary>Other</summary>

**Deepsteel Blocks**, **Polychromite Blocks**, **Blocks of Uranium** and **Blocks of Radium Sludge** can be compressed from their respective items.

**Deepsteel Doors** and **Deepsteel Trapdoors** can be crafted using Deepsteel Plates in the same pattern as other doors and trapdoors. They can NOT be opened by right-clicking and require a Redstone signal, similar to Iron Doors.

**Radio Torches**, **Radio Lanterns**, and **Radio Campfires** are crafted like their normal counterparts, but with Radium Sludge substituted for Coal/Charcoal. Food cooked by Radio Campfires applies the "Irradiated" effect for 30 seconds.

**Radio Fire** is a new variant of fire.  It deals 8 damage and applies the "Irradiated" effect when touched.  It can be created with a Flint and Steel on Radium ore, Deepslate Radium Ore, Blocks of Radium Sludge, and Blocks of Uranium.

You can craft **Artificing Tables** the way you would a Smithing Table, but replace the Iron with Deepsteel Plates. They can be used for adding charges to Deepsteel Bombs (See: "Items/Weapons") or bits to Deepsteel Keys (See: "Items/Tools").

The new **Super TNT** block behaves like normal TNT, but the explosion strength is doubled and an AoE cloud of the new "Irradiated" effect is spawned after the explosion.

**Presents** come in all colors of dye (White, light gray, gray, black, brown, red, orange, yellow, lime, green, cyan, light blue, blue, purple, magenta and pink) and are crafted with their dye surrounded by 8 Paper. To have any functionality, you must add contents via an Artificing Table - They can accept 1 bundle or up to 3 Splash Potions. If the Present contains Splash Potions when it is broken, then those effects will be applied to nearby entities. If the Present contains a Bundle, the items from that bundle will drop instead of the present itself.
</details>

  
</details>
<details>
<summary>Status Effects</summary>
  
**Radiation Sickness** can be applied by Deepsteel Bombs (with Radioactive Charges), stepping on Radium Ore, Deepslate Radium Ore, Blocks of Raw Radium, or Blocks of Uranium, being damaged by an Irradiated Zombie, or by eating food cooked on a Radio Campfire. It divides the amount you heal by 4, so if you would normally heal less than 2 hearts at a time, you don't heal at all.  If you would heal 4 hearts normally, you only heal half a heart.

Fairy Bread has a 25% chance to apply the new **Grace** effect for 10 seconds.  While this effect lasts, all negative status effects below level 1 are removed and cannot be applied, and hostile entities (ONLY with the Active Target Goal) won't target you.

~~By brewing a Deepsteel Plate into an Awkward Potion, you get a Potion of **Resilience**. This new effect sets your max armor to 40 (normally it is just 20) and, for each level, adds 10 armor. It also negates 25% of knockback per level for the duration of the effect. They can be amplified via Glowstone Dust and lengthened via Redstone Dust.~~
</details>
<details>
<summary>Enchantments</summary>
  
**Condensing** can be applied to Pickaxes and Shovels. When a tool enchanted with it mines Uranium Ore or Deepslate Uranium Ore, instead of dropping 1-4 Radium Sludge, it drops 1 Uranium Ingot. When used to mine Polychromite-Infused Sand, instead of dropping 1-4 Polychromite Dust, it drops 1-2 Polychromite Ingots. When used to mine Polychromite Ore, instead of dropping some number of Chromite Nuggets, it drops 1-3 Raw Polychromite.

**Weighted Shaft** can be used on Spears. It decreases their attack cooldown.

**Frost Aspect** can also be used on spears, and makes the target of an attack Freeze for up to 30 seconds (if it is at its max level, 2).
</details>

## Frequently Asked Questions (FAQs)

<details>
<summary>How may I use this mod in my own content?</summary>

_"Credit" refers to either a link to my Modrinth profile or to this Modrinth page._

**Servers** - When using this mod on a server, credit is appreciated but NOT required.

**Videos** - When using this mod in a video, if the mod is prominently featured (like in a showcase) credit IS required.  Otherwise (for example, if the video is an SMP and the mod just comes with it), credit is appreciated but NOT required.

**Modpacks** - When adding this mod to a modpack, credit IS required on the page of the modpack.  When playing a modpack with this mod, credit is appreciated but NOT required.
</details>

<details>
<summary>How can I help?</summary>

I am currently just doing this as a hobby, so you cannot donate to me.  However, if you find any issues or bugs, **reporting the issues on the issue tracker** would be extremely helpful.  Also, to let me know that people are enjoying the mods I make, **liking/following** the mod would be greatly appreciated.
</details>
<details>
<summary>May I make a port of this mod?</summary>

No, you **MAY NOT** port this mod to a different modloader, a different Minecraft version, or a different platform.  I worked very hard to concept, program, and publish this mod, and while I understand that the loader/version/platform of this mod might not suit everybody's wishes, I do not want anyone to make a port of this mod.

Currently, I try to keep all of my (unarchived) mods up-to-date with the latest version of Minecraft.  Please be patient if the mod is not updated as soon as you like.  I am probably working on it when I have time.
</details>
<details>
<summary>What Minecraft versions do you plan on updating/backporting this mod to?</summary>

I try to update the mod to the latest Minecraft version as soon as possible. When the mod itself gets updates like new features or content, only the latest version of Minecraft will receive that content. I do not plan on backporting this mod.
</details>
<details>
<summary>Where do you recommend I start learning how to mod?</summary>

I mostly taught myself, but I definitely used resources like [**Datapack Generators**](https://misode.github.io) which is a useful tool for legibly creating .json files. Also, [**Modding by Kaupenjoe**](https://youtube.com/@ModdingByKaupenjoe) is a YouTube channel with EXTREMELY helpful tutorials about most aspects of modding Minecraft.
</details>
<details>
<summary>How do I install this mod?</summary>

First, download the [**Fabric Installer**](https://fabricmc.net/use/installer/) and the [**Fabric API**](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api). Put the Fabric API into your “mods” folder along with this one. Then, open the Minecraft Launcher and launch the game. (MAKE SURE that the Fabric Loader, Fabric API, and this mod are all the same version!)
</details>




Thank you for reading to the end! I hope you enjoyed playing with this mod as much as I enjoyed coding it!
